g.text: Cross-group shared-component ledger (TM-CA-165) — two cosigner sets {A,s},{B,s} share Σ⟦Ground(s)⟧
two compound deploys share cosigner s
seed the LIVE ledger remaining := raw
process groups in canonical SigKey order
draw 2 DOWN the ledger (combined-first, then matched pair)
REJECT-BOTH on the exhausted shared stack
(linear logic: a token is spent once)
read Σ⟦Ground(s)⟧'s FULL balance 3, BOTH admit,
REPLAY re-runs the IDENTICAL ledger (margin-free, SigKey order)
reject-both on the exhausted shared stack
